description:
Essay Writer is a writing tool for students, it is designed to improve organising and writing skills in an easy-to-use and accessible format.


Which editions are affected?
1. All editions: IdeaMapper Desktop Cloud, IdeaMapperPro, IdeaMapperK12, IdeaMapperHigherEd and EssayWriter.
How to get this release?
1. For desktop installations: Go to https://essaywritersoftware.com, follow HelpDesk and download links for your platform, download the installer file, then install. The previous version will be upgraded.
What’s New?
- Further improvements to accessibility support (user interface, keyboard shortcuts, tooltips.)
- Improved error reporting through the log window.
Bug Fixes?
- There are numerous bug fixes, none critical.
